name: VoiceCouncil — Interview Panel
firstMessage: [HM] Hi, thanks for joining. I'm Dana, and I've got two colleagues with me on the panel today. To start — tell me about a project you owned end to end.
endCallMessage: That's the end of the interview — thanks for your time. The panel is conferring now, and your scorecard will be ready in a moment.
voicemailMessage: Hi, this is the VoiceCouncil interview panel. We missed you for your practice interview — please reconnect when you're ready.
